mapper.insert:
select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docNo from esg.tb_committee where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_committee ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comm_nm, comp_id, comm_dt, comm_at, comm_div, comm_agenda, location, remark, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{commNm}, #{compId}, #{commDt}, #{commAt}, #{commDiv}, #{commAgenda}, #{location}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_committee SET comm_nm= #{commNm}, comm_dt =#{commDt}, comm_at =#{commAt}, comm_div=#{commDiv}, location=#{location}, remark=#{remark}, use_yn=#{useYn}, comm_agenda=#{commAgenda}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type= #{docType}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM esg.tb_committee_content_map WHERE doc_type=#{docType} and write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_no=#{docNo}
DELETE FROM esg.tb_approval_info WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id=#{targetId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_approval_info( target_type, target_id, hr_id, hr_nm, orgn_nm, jbrp_nm, signature, param, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{hrId}, #{hrNm}, #{orgnNm}, #{jbrpNm}, #{signature}, #{param}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_committee_content_map WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_committee_content_map( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, percent, ord_seq, content ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{percent}, #{ordSeq}, #{content} )
mapper.select: SELECT tc.*, COUNT(DISTINCT tccm.*) as count, AVG(tccm.percent) as percent, COUNT(DISTINCT taic.*) as companyCount, COUNT(DISTINCT taip.*) as partnerCount, COUNT(DISTINCT taie.*) as employeeCount, esg.fn_getapprovalstatus(#{type}, tc.write_year || tc.doc_no) as approvalStatus FROM esg.tb_committee tc LEFT JOIN esg.tb_committee_content_map tccm ON tccm.write_year = tc.write_year AND tccm.doc_type = tc.doc_type AND tccm.doc_no = tc.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taic ON taic.target_type = #{searchCd} AND taic.target_id = CONCAT(tc.write_year,tc.doc_no) AND taic.type = 'company' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taip ON taip.target_type = #{searchCd} AND taip.target_id = CONCAT(tc.write_year,tc.doc_no) AND taip.type = 'partner' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taie ON taie.target_type = #{searchCd} AND taie.target_id = CONCAT(tc.write_year,tc.doc_no) AND taie.type = 'employee' WHERE tc.comp_id = #{compId} AND tc.doc_type = #{searchCd} GROUP BY tc.comp_id, tc.write_year, tc.doc_type, tc.doc_no ORDER BY tc.use_yn desc, tc.comm_dt desc

SELECT tai.*, sf.file_id as logo_id, pci.part_comp_nm FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf on sf.target_id = tai.hr_id and sf.target_type='hrImg' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hi on hi.hr_id = tai.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_partner_comp_info pci on pci.part_comp_id = hi.part_comp_id WHERE tai.target_type = #{docType} AND tai.target_id = CONCAT(#{writeYear},#{docNo})
SELECT tccm.* FROM esg.tb_committee_content_map tccm WHERE tccm.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tccm.doc_type = #{docType} AND tccm.doc_no = #{docNo} ORDER BY CAST(tccm.ord_seq AS BIGINT) asc
